description.value:
Category: Taijutsu

Prerequisite: Silent Fist Stance, Level 4+

You have trained under the teachings of the Land of Silence either directly or by descension, gaining the following benefits:

• Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

• While you are in the Silent Fist Stance, your [Unarmed Damage] die becomes a d8.

If you have Iron Claws this instead becomes 1d10 if Dexterity is your Taijutsu ability modifier.

• Taijutsu you know that requires the Silent Fist Stance to be cast, and up to two additional Taijutsu that you know, that requires you to make no more than two taijutsu attacks become Silent Fist Taijutsu.

Silent Fist Taijutsu you cast gain the Echo trait.

- Echo.

Once per casting, when you deal [Unarmed Damage] to a creature, you leave an Echo of your strike, recording the damage dice rolled.

If the affected creature would attempt to attack or cast a jutsu that would be harmful to another creature before the beginning of your next turn, you can trigger this echo.

Reroll the damage die of your echoed strike and select the two highest dice results, dealing the result + your taijutsu modifier in damage.

activation.condition: when you deal [Unarmed Damage] to a creature & if the affected creature would attempt to attack or cast a jutsu that would be harmful to another creature before the beginning of your next turn
